name: Pineapple Sweet Potato Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 1 lb 2 oz Can Whole sweet potatoes (3 cups)
8 3/4 Oz Can Crushed pineapple, drained (1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the sweet potatoes.
2. Add butter, salt, and orange juice to the mashed sweet potatoes.
3. Beat until light and fluffy with an electric or rotary mixer.
4. Stir in the crushed pineapple.
5. Pour into a greased 1-quart casserole dish.
6. Dot with additional butter.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for about 45 minutes.
8. During the last 10 to 15 minutes of baking, sprinkle halved marshmallows over the top (you may also add walnut halves and pineapple spears if desired).
9. Continue baking until the marshmallows are melted and golden brown.
Serves 6.
Per serving: Calories 401; fat 6.1 g (12.9%); cholesterol 15 mg; carbohydrate 90.3 g (84.5%); fiber 3.6 g; protein 2.8 g; sodium 271 mg; potassium 573 mg; calcium 62 mg; vitamin A 3035 iu.
